evals.name: plausibility-checks-integration
evals.prompt: I've trained a churn prediction model on eda-workspace/test-datasets/churn_data.csv with target='churned'. Can you run business plausibility checks? I expect tenure and monthly_charges to be important predictors, and the churn probability should be between 0 and 1.
evals.expected_output: Should run validate_business_plausibility() with domain expectations and report results including prediction range, feature importance sanity, and prediction distribution checks.

assertions.text: Runs business plausibility checks using validate_business_plausibility()
Validates predictions fall within expected range (0 to 1 for classification)
Checks feature importance against expected top features
Verifies prediction distribution is not degenerate
Saves plausibility report to report bus
